when_to_use_now: Use when deciding whether a prospective sf09 cycle would materially change Table 1B, LIMEN-C-012, or thesis wording.
must_not_substitute_for: Not a source of row facts, proof-ceiling wording, or dashboard-ready comparison values by itself.
reopen_only_if: A new official municipal buyer-side or public-companion document changes Amsterdam/Helsinki blocker state, or route order drifts.
paper_thesis_use: Sprint routing note, methods limitation control, and reviewer-response priority explanation.

when_to_use_now: Use when choosing which Table 1B-related public-sector view is safe by default for manuscript, dashboard, or thesis reuse.
must_not_substitute_for: Not a substitute for row-level evidence ceilings or reviewer-safe prose by itself.
reopen_only_if: A view's default visibility, required caution, or threshold event changes.
paper_thesis_use: Figure/table deployment planning and thesis exhibit routing.
visualization_dashboard_hook: Core comparison card; ladder inset; core-vs-sidecar legend gate.

when_to_use_now: Use when Denmark, shared six-row reuse, or denominator language appears in prose, legends, or reviewer answers.
must_not_substitute_for: Not a reason to promote Denmark into the default five-row core or claim a materialized shared dashboard export.
reopen_only_if: A deliberate synchronized denominator rewrite happens or sidecar status changes.
paper_thesis_use: Methods footnote, reviewer-control note, and thesis denominator-governance explanation.
visualization_dashboard_hook: Core-vs-sidecar badge and blocked shared-export caution note.

when_to_use_now: Use before patching shared figure/table, caption, manuscript-bridge, or blocked-export language to confirm no-drift reuse.
must_not_substitute_for: Not a new evidence source and not a threshold-changing artifact on its own.
reopen_only_if: Any shared surface drifts, a caption rule changes, or a blocked export is actually promoted.
paper_thesis_use: Publication QA appendix, reviewer-response traceability note, and thesis reproducibility check.
visualization_dashboard_hook: No-drift validator for Table 1B package surfaces.

when_to_use_now: Use when deciding which Table 1B artifact belongs in claims, methods, results, limitations, or appendix slots.
must_not_substitute_for: Not a substitute for default-view selection or caption-safe wording.
reopen_only_if: A new thesis/article slot is added or one slot's supporting artifact changes.
paper_thesis_use: Fast thesis assembly and article-architecture routing.
visualization_dashboard_hook: Exhibit placement and appendix/main-text split planning.

when_to_use_now: Use when manuscript, reviewer-response, or thesis prose needs one ready paragraph that already preserves Amsterdam/Helsinki/UK/ORION cautions.
must_not_substitute_for: Not a primary source of truth for denominator decisions, sidecar status, or exact row-level evidence paths.
reopen_only_if: Shared claim wording drifts or the underlying proof-ceiling/queue state changes.
paper_thesis_use: Direct paragraph lift for Results plus limitations.
visualization_dashboard_hook: Tooltip/caption prose source, not a table-body artifact.

when_to_use_now: Use when a writer needs case-level safe labels, allowed claims, and stronger-source-needed routing for each public-sector row.
must_not_substitute_for: Not a default visual export or a complete reviewer-rebuttal bundle by itself.
reopen_only_if: One row changes evidence tier or a stronger-source-needed field changes.
paper_thesis_use: Case-level claim support map and thesis claim-support appendix.
visualization_dashboard_hook: Row badge planning and per-case legend support.

when_to_use_now: Use when a consumer needs the minimum artifact bundle that must move together before any Table 1B reuse.
must_not_substitute_for: Not a per-view router or a replacement for row-specific caution text.
reopen_only_if: A must-travel dependency changes, a blocked export is promoted, or a new mandatory control surface appears.
paper_thesis_use: Reproducibility checklist and reviewer-facing artifact bundle summary.
